title: Thoovaanam Lyrics Romeo Juliet Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Romeo Juliet Thoovaanam Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Vishal Dadlani & Sunitha Sarathy
Music : D Imman

kadavul varangal
tharum pala kadhai kettaen.
avalae varamaai
varuvadhai
ingu paarthaen.

Kuyilena manam koovum
mayilena tharai thaavum
ennodu nee nirkkum
velayil.

puzhudhiyum palingaagum
pulikkalum punidhaam
kaal vaithu
nee sellum saalayil.

yaar theengu sedhaalum
mannikka thondrum.
nee thandha immattram
en vetkam thoondum.

Iravugal thunai naadum
kanavugal kadai podum
nee illai endraal
naan kaagidham.

Viralgalil viral korkka
udhatinai uvarppaakka
nee vandhaal
naan vanna oviyam.

nee thaan kaithookka
vendum en kannae.
kai neetu thaalaattu
kan mooduven.

kadavul varangal
tharum pala kadhai kettaen.
avalae varamaai
varuvadhai
ingu paarthaen.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Thoovaanam?

The song Thoovaanam expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the romantic theme of Romeo Juliet.

How does Thoovaanam fit into the movie plot?

In Romeo Juliet, the song captures the essence of the protagonists' love story, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who are the singers of Thoovaanam?

The song features the talented voices of Sunitha Sarathy and Vishal Dadlani.

When was Thoovaanam released?

Thoovaanam was released on March 12, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thoovaanam, the singers convey a heartfelt expression of love that resonates deeply with listeners. The song serves as a pivotal moment in Romeo Juliet, encapsulating the emotions of the lead characters as they navigate their romantic journey. With its soothing melody and poignant lyrics, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and joy. This enchanting duet is perfect for celebrating love on special occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thoovaanam from Romeo Juliet is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Sunitha Sarathy and Vishal Dadlani, this song takes you on a romantic journey filled with heartfelt emotions. Experience the magic of their collaboration as they bring this captivating melody to life.
stanzaMeanings: I saw you in the rain, falling like drops of water.
I felt a deep connection, like a soul crying out.
I have heard many stories about the arrival of God. I saw her coming here as a blessing.
What else do I need in life?
I saw you in the rain, falling like drops of water.
In the role of a cuckoo, you sing, and as a peacock, you stand beside me.
With flowers and fruits, you speak in a sacred place.
No matter who tries to harm, it will always come back to you. What you gave me will always stay with me.
When love comes, anger will also fade away.
I saw you in the rain, falling like drops of water.
Nights are companions, and dreams will tell stories. If you are not there, I am just a paper.
If you come, I will become a colorful painting with my fingers.
In my heart, there is a beautiful melody that plays softly.
You are the one I need, my dear. I will dance with my hands and close my eyes.
I saw you in the rain, falling like drops of water.
I felt a deep connection, like a soul crying out.
I have heard many stories about the arrival of God. I saw her coming here as a blessing.
What else do I need in life?
